item.title: 苹果或允许第三方 AI 接入 Siri
item.guid: 苹果或允许第三方-AI-接入-Siri
item.description:
Today, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman wrote that Apple plans to open up Siri access to third-party competitors in the upcoming iOS 27 system to restructure its on-device AI ecosystem. 今日，彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 发文称，苹果计划在即将发布的 iOS 27 系统中向第三方竞争对手开放 Siri 接入权限，以重构其端侧 AI 生态。

Sources revealed that Apple is developing a new system called "Extensions." This feature will allow third-party AI chatbots installed via the App Store (such as Google Gemini and Anthropic's Claude) to be deeply integrated with Siri. 知情人士透露，苹果正在开发一套名为「Extensions」的新系统。该功能将允许通过 App Store 安装的第三方 AI 聊天机器人（如 Google Gemini 和 Anthropic 的 Claude）与 Siri 深度集成。

It is reported that users can freely enable or disable various AI services in the settings panel of iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27, and directly route requests to specified external large models when issuing commands. 据悉，用户可在 iOS 27、iPadOS 27 及 macOS 27 的设置面板中自由开启或关闭各项 AI 服务，并在下达指令时直接将请求路由至指定的外部大模型。

Currently, Apple Intelligence is powered by OpenAI's ChatGPT, and this adjustment means that ChatGPT is no longer Apple's only option. 目前，苹果的 Apple Intelligence 由 OpenAI 的 ChatGPT 提供服务，而本次调整则意味着 ChatGPT 不再是苹果的唯一选择。

Gurman also mentioned that Apple issued rare off-cycle bonuses to its iPhone hardware design team this week to prevent key talent from flowing to AI startups like OpenAI. Gurman 还提到，苹果在本周向其 iPhone 硬件设计团队发放了罕见的非周期性奖金，以防范核心人才流失至 OpenAI 等人工智能初创企业。

According to reports, Apple issued special bonuses to several members of the iPhone Product Design (PD) team. The bonuses were distributed in the form of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), vesting over four years, with a total value of approximately $200,000 to $400,000 after full vesting. 据报道，苹果向 iPhone 产品设计（PD）团队的多名成员发放了特别奖金。该笔奖金以受限股（RSU）形式发放，需分四年行权，员工完整行权后的总价值约为 20 万至 40 万美元。

Currently, OpenAI's hardware division, co-managed by former Apple iPhone product design head Tang Tan, has recruited dozens of Apple engineers who previously participated in the development of iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. 目前，由前苹果 iPhone 产品设计主管 Tang Tan 参与管理的 OpenAI 硬件部门，已累计招募了数十名曾参与 iPhone、iPad、Apple Watch 及 Vision Pro 研发的苹果工程师。

Additionally, Apple's Mac Pro has been officially removed from Apple's official website. 另外，苹果的 Mac Pro 正式从苹果官网下架。

According to Gurman, the Mac Pro has been discontinued. He also stated that Apple had already hinted at the Mac Pro's fate a month ago: 据 Gurman 报道，目前 Mac Pro 已停产。同时其也表示，苹果其实早在一个月前就已经暗示了 Mac Pro 的命运：

    Mac Pro is out of stock in retail stores and online channels;

    Discontinued Pro Display XDR and named the new product Studio Display.

item.title: 真我将于 4 月关停官方商城
item.guid: 真我将于-4-月关停官方商城
item.description:
On March 26, realme Mall's official website posted an announcement stating: 3 月 26 日，真我商城官网发文表示：

Due to company business planning adjustments, realme Mall will cease to provide shopping, product content browsing, user feedback, activity participation, product reviews, post comments, video and live streaming viewing, and points services on April 25, 2026, while retaining historical order information inquiry services.

realme stated that OPPO Mall will subsequently allow users to query their historical order information from realme Mall; membership benefits under realme Mall can continue to be used in OPPO Mall. 真我表示，OPPO 商城后续可以查询用户在真我商城的历史订单信息；真我商城下的会员权益可在 OPPO 商城中继续使用。

Additionally, realme Community recently announced that due to company business planning adjustments, realme Community will cease to provide community operations at 14:00 on April 25, 2026. Subsequent realme phone-related content and interactions will continue to be operated within the OPPO Mall community. 另外，真我社区近期也宣布，因公司业务规划调整，真我社区将于 2026 年 4 月 25 日 14:00 停止提供社区运营，后续真我手机相关内容与互动，将在 OPPO 商城圈子继续运营。

In January this year, realme officially returned to OPPO Mall, launching products such as mobile phones and earphones; at the same time, realme fully integrated into OPPO's after-sales service system. 今年 1 月，真我（realme）正式回归 OPPO 商城，并上架手机、耳机等产品；同时 realme 全面接入 OPPO 的售后服务体系。

item.title: 小米汽车遭「老头乐」公司起诉
item.guid: 小米汽车遭「老头乐」公司起诉
item.description:
According to Shenzhen Business Daily, Shandong Yanlu New Energy Vehicle Co., Ltd. recently filed a request for invalidation against 3 exterior design patents of Xiaomi Auto, involving the rear bumper, front bumper, and headlights. The China National Intellectual Property Administration completed the oral hearing yesterday. 据《深圳商报》，山东燕鲁新能源车业有限公司近日对小米汽车 3 件外观专利提起了无效宣告请求，涉及后保险杠、前保险杠及前大灯，国家知识产权局已于昨天完成了口头审理。

The three patents for which invalidation was requested are all exterior design patents under Xiaomi Auto Technology Co., Ltd., namely headlights (patent number 2023300276401), front bumper (patent number 2023300278040), and rear bumper (patent number 2023300280286). 被申请无效的三项专利均为小米汽车科技有限公司名下的外观设计专利，分别为前大灯（专利号 2023300276401）、前保险杠（专利号 2023300278040）及后保险杠（专利号 2023300280286）。

All three patents were filed on January 19, 2023, and officially granted in March last year. Their design solutions have been applied to main models such as Xiaomi SU7 and YU7, forming a core part of these vehicles' exterior. 三项专利均于 2023 年 1 月 19 日提交申请，去年 3 月正式获得授权，其设计方案已应用于小米 SU7、YU7 等主力车型，是上述车型外观的核心组成部分。

Shandong Yanlu New Energy Vehicle's registered address is Gaotang County, Liaocheng City, Shandong Province. Its core products are electric tricycles, commonly known as "laotoule" (elderly fun) low-speed electric vehicles, with prices ranging from 5,000 to 20,000 yuan. 山东燕鲁新能源车业注册地位于山东省聊城市高唐县，核心产品为电动正三轮摩托车，即市场俗称的「老头乐」低速电动车，产品定价集中在 5000-20000 元区间。

It is understood that an "oral hearing" is a review stage in the patent invalidation procedure and is not equivalent to a final ruling. During yesterday's hearing, both parties completed their evidence presentation and arguments around key points of contention, such as whether the patents in question have obvious differences from existing designs and whether they meet the statutory authorization conditions for design patents. 据悉，「口头审理」是专利无效程序中的一个审查环节，并不等同于最终裁定。昨天的审理中，双方围绕涉案专利是否与现有设计存在明显区别、是否符合外观设计专利法定授权条件等核心争议焦点完成了举证与辩论。

Meanwhile, yesterday, according to Fengkou Caijing, it was learned from Yanlu New Energy, the party involved, that both sides reached a settlement on March 25, and the details of the settlement are currently inconvenient to disclose. 而在昨日，据风口财经从当事的燕鲁新能源方获悉，双方已于 3 月 25 日达成和解，和解内容暂不方便透露。

item.title: 本田和索尼叫停电动汽车合资项目
item.guid: 本田和索尼叫停电动汽车合资项目
item.description:
Afeela1

Sony and Honda jointly released a statement yesterday, announcing the termination of all electric vehicle development and launch plans for their joint venture, "Sony Honda Mobility" (SHM), and will re-evaluate SHM's business direction. 索尼与本田昨日联合发布声明，宣布终止旗下合资公司「索尼本田移动出行」（Sony Honda Mobility，SHM）的全部电动汽车开发与上市计划，并将对 SHM 的业务方向展开重新评估。

This collaboration began in 2022, with both parties forming a joint venture with 50% ownership each, planning to launch Afeela, a high-end electric vehicle brand integrating Sony's PS5 technology ecosystem. 这一合作始于 2022 年，双方以各持股 50% 的形式成立合资公司，计划推出融合索尼 PS5 技术生态的高端电动汽车品牌 Afeela。

The first model, Afeela 1, had previously started pre-production and was originally planned for official delivery in Japan and the United States in the middle of this year; the second model also completed its global debut at this year's CES. However, the project was announced to be terminated less than four years after its initiation. 首款车型 Afeela 1 此前已启动预生产，原计划今年年中在日本及美国正式交付；第二款车型也已于今年 CES 展完成全球首秀。然而项目在推进不到四年后即宣告终止。

The fundamental reason for the halt is Honda's deep financial crisis. Honda is expected to report its first annual net loss since its listing this fiscal year, and its electrification business continues to suffer setbacks in North America—multiple EV projects have been successively halted, and its electrification partnership with General Motors has also come to an end. 叫停的根本原因，在于本田深陷财务危机。本田本财年预计将出现上市以来的首次年度净亏损，其电动化业务在北美持续受挫——多个电动车项目相继叫停，与通用汽车的电动化合作也走向终止。

Hideki Yasuda, an analyst at Toyo Securities, believes that Sony is highly likely to continue advancing related businesses, regardless of Honda's involvement. 东洋证券分析师安田秀树认为，索尼大概率会继续推进相关业务，无论是否有本田参与。

item.title: 林俊旸离职后首发长文：反思千问得失
item.guid: 林俊旸离职后首发长文：反思千问得失
item.description:
In the early morning of March 4, Lin Junyang, the technical lead for Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen (Qwen), suddenly posted on X, bidding farewell to the open-source model project he had nurtured. 3 月 4 日凌晨，阿里通义千问（Qwen）技术负责人林俊旸在 X 突然发文，向自己一手带大的开源模型项目告别。

Nearly a month after leaving Alibaba, Lin Junyang published a lengthy article on social media, pointing out that the first wave of inference models, represented by OpenAI o1 and DeepSeek-R1, validated the value of reinforcement learning in the post-training phase. However, the core of the industry's next stage will shift towards "agent-like thinking," where models continuously refine strategies by interacting with real environments and acting. 在离开阿里近一个月后，林俊旸于社交平台发表长文指出，第一波以 OpenAI o1 和 DeepSeek-R1 为代表的推理模型验证了强化学习在后训练阶段的价值，但行业下一阶段的核心将转向「智能体式思考」，即模型通过与真实环境交互并在行动中持续修正策略。

Additionally, Lin Junyang rarely reviewed the limitations of Qwen3's early attempts to integrate "thinking" and "instruction" dual modes. 此外，林俊旸罕见复盘了 Qwen3 早期尝试融合「思考」与「指令」双模式的局限性。

He frankly stated that due to the structural contradiction in underlying data requirements between instruction scenarios aiming for efficient execution and deliberative inference scenarios, forced integration easily leads to compromised model performance. 他坦言，由于追求高效执行的指令场景与深思熟虑的推理场景在底层数据需求上存在结构性矛盾，强行融合易导致模型表现妥协。

This also explains why Qwen later re-split the Instruct and Thinking product lines into independent ones in subsequent versions (such as version 2507) to meet commercial clients' demands for high throughput and low cost. 这也解释了 Qwen 在后续版本（如 2507 版本）中重新拆分 Instruct 与 Thinking 独立产品线，以满足商业客户对高吞吐和低成本需求的原因。

🔗 Related Reading: Lin Junyang's First Long Post After Resignation: Reflecting on Qwen's Gains and Losses, Predicting "Agentic Thinking" is Needed for AI's Second Half 🔗 相关阅读： 林俊旸离职后首发长文：反思千问得失，预判 AI 下半场需要「智能体思维」

item.title: xAI 被曝再走一名联创，11 人仅剩 1 位
item.guid: xAI-被曝再走一名联创，11-人仅剩-1-位
item.description:
According to BusinessInsider, another co-founder has left Elon Musk's AI startup xAI, bringing the total to 10 out of the initial 11 co-founders who have departed. 据 BusinessInsider 报道，马斯克旗下人工智能初创公司 xAI 的联合创始人再走一位，至此该公司初始的 11 名联合创始人中已有 10 人退出。

Sources revealed that Manuel Kroiss has officially informed the company of his decision to leave. At xAI, he was primarily responsible for model pre-training and reported directly to Elon Musk. 知情人士透露，Manuel Kroiss 已正式通知公司其离职决定。他在 xAI 主要负责模型预训练工作，并直接向埃隆·马斯克汇报。

Previously, he co-led the improvement of xAI's coding model with Guodong Zhang, another Chinese co-founder who left earlier this month. Before joining xAI, Kroiss worked at Google and DeepMind, possessing a deep technical background in areas such as reinforcement learning. 此前，他曾与本月上旬离职的另一位华人联合创始人 Guodong Zhang 共同主导改进 xAI 的编码模型。在加入 xAI 前，Kroiss 曾任职于谷歌和 DeepMind，在强化学习等领域具备深厚技术背景。

With Kroiss's departure, only Ross Nordeen remains among the 11 co-founders from xAI's early days. 随着 Kroiss 的离开，xAI 创立初期的 11 位联合创始人目前仅剩 Ross Nordeen 一人留守。

It is reported that Ross Nordeen is a "direct descendant" of Elon Musk's Tesla, having served as a Tesla Technical Program Manager for nearly four years, primarily responsible for supporting the high-performance computing infrastructure of the Supercomputing and Machine Learning departments. 据悉，Ross Nordeen 属于马斯克的特斯拉「嫡系」，曾担任特斯拉技术项目经理近四年，主要负责支持超级计算与机器学习部门的高性能计算基础设施。

item.title: 微信官方解读「正在输入」背后原理
item.guid: 微信官方解读「正在输入」背后原理
item.description:
Yesterday, WeChat's official public account "WeChat Pai" published an article explaining the trigger mechanism and underlying technical principles of the "对方正在输入…" (The other party is typing...) feature in WeChat chats. The article pointed out that the appearance of "The other party is typing" requires two conditions to be met simultaneously: 昨天，微信官方公众号「微信派」发文，解答了微信聊天中「对方正在输入…」功能的触发机制及其背后技术原理。文章指出，「对方正在输入」的出现需同时满足两个条件：

    Timeliness, meaning the recipient must open the chat window within 10 seconds after the message is sent;

    Action, meaning the other party must actually type content into the input box after opening the chat window (even if it's just a space).

On a technical level, WeChat officially defines this as a "signaling handshake" mechanism. WeChat chat uses a model similar to a "walkie-talkie control tower": when a user initiates a chat, the system requests a temporary private channel; if the other party opens the chat window within 10 seconds, the server captures this action and immediately notifies the sender. 在技术层面，微信官方将其定义为「信令握手」机制。微信聊天采用类似「对讲机指挥塔」的模式，当用户发起聊天，系统会申请临时私密频道；若对方在 10 秒内打开对话框，服务器便会捕捉这一动作并即时通知发送方。

In this article, WeChat also responded to the question of "why there is no 'read receipt' feature": "Read" implies "seen, but not replied to," which can easily lead to suspicion, anxiety, and even create pressure to reply. 在这篇文章中，微信还回应了「为何没有已读功能」的疑问：「已读」意味着「看见了，但没回你」，容易引发猜忌焦虑，甚至形成催促回复的压力。

WeChat emphasized that not having a read receipt feature returns the choice of "whether to respond or not" to the user; while "The other party is typing" is a "limited transparency," conveying an online signal while also preserving space for thought and silence for both parties. 微信强调，不设已读功能，是将「回应与否」的选择权交还给用户；而「对方正在输入」则是一种「有限度的透明」，在传递在线信号的同时，也为双方保留了思考与沉默的空间。

item.title: 曝 Kimi 考虑赴港 IPO，估值约 180 亿美元
item.guid: 曝-Kimi-考虑赴港-IPO，估值约-180-亿美元
item.description:
According to China Daily and Bloomberg, Moonshot AI (Kimi) is considering an initial public offering (IPO) in Hong Kong to raise funds, leveraging investors' growing enthusiasm for the AI sector. 据《中国日报》和彭博社报道，月之暗面（Kimi）正考虑在香港进行首次公开募股（IPO），以借助投资者对 AI 领域日益高涨的热情完成融资。

Insiders revealed that Moonshot AI has initiated preliminary contact with China International Capital Corporation (CICC) and Goldman Sachs Group regarding a potential listing, but the specific timeline remains unclear. 知情人士透露，月之暗面已与中国国际资本公司（CICC）及高盛集团就潜在上市事宜展开初步接触，但具体时间表尚不明朗。

Meanwhile, Moonshot AI is also actively pursuing private financing. The company reportedly completed a funding round of over $700 million earlier this year and is currently in talks to raise an additional $1 billion, which would bring the company's valuation to approximately $18 billion. 与此同时，Moonshot AI 也在积极推进私募融资。据报道，该公司今年早些时候已完成逾 7 亿美元的融资轮次，目前正在洽谈额外筹集最高 10 亿美元的资金，扩大后的融资轮次将使公司估值达到约 180 亿美元。

Bloomberg noted that several Chinese AI companies have already completed listings in Hong Kong, with Zhipu AI and MiniMax both seeing their valuations climb to approximately $40 billion after listing on the Hong Kong stock exchange in January this year. 彭博社指出，目前已有多家中国 AI 公司完成香港上市，其中智谱和 MiniMax 两家公司今年 1 月登陆港股后，估值均已攀升至约 400 亿美元。

item.title: Google 发布新型 AI 内存压缩技术，存储股集体下跌
item.guid: Google-发布新型-AI-内存压缩技术，存储股集体下跌
item.description:
Yesterday, Google Research released the AI memory compression algorithm "TurboQuant." 昨天，Google 研究院发布 AI 内存压缩算法「TurboQuant」。

According to the introduction, this algorithm can compress the KV Cache (Key-Value Cache) during large language model inference by at least 6 times, while achieving up to 8 times faster inference on NVIDIA H100 GPUs. The related paper will be officially published at ICLR 2026 next month. 据介绍，该算法可将大语言模型推理过程中的 KV Cache（键值缓存）压缩至少 6 倍，同时在英伟达 H100 GPU 上实现最高 8 倍的推理提速，相关论文下月将在 ICLR 2026 上正式发布。

Key metrics are as follows: 核心指标如下：

    KV Cache memory footprint compressed by at least 6 times, with quantization precision as low as 3 bits, no retraining or fine-tuning required;

    On NVIDIA H100 GPUs, 4-bit TurboQuant inference speed is up to 8 times faster than the 32-bit unquantized version;

    Achieves zero precision loss in long-context benchmark tests such as "Needle in a Haystack."

Following the announcement, the US stock storage chip sector experienced significant intraday sell-offs, with leading companies like Micron Technology and SanDisk closing significantly lower. The storage chip related index saw a single-day decline of over 2%. Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince called this release Google's "DeepSeek moment." 消息发出后，美股存储芯片板块盘中遭遇明显抛售，美光科技、闪迪等头部企业股价显著收跌，存储芯片相关指数单日跌幅超 2%。Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince 将此次发布称为 Google 的「DeepSeek 时刻」。

TurboQuant is currently still in the laboratory stage and only addresses memory issues during the inference phase, while GPU memory consumption during the training phase remains unaffected. TurboQuant 目前仍处于实验室阶段，且仅解决推理阶段的内存问题，训练阶段的显存消耗不受影响。

🔗 Related reading: A paper triggered a crash in storage chip stocks, has Google's "DeepSeek moment" arrived? 🔗 相关阅读： 一篇论文引发存储芯片股暴跌，Google 的「DeepSeek 时刻」来了？

item.title: 美团公布「外卖大战」后成绩单，由盈转亏 234 亿元
item.guid: 美团公布「外卖大战」后成绩单，由盈转亏-234-亿元
item.description:
Yesterday, Meituan announced its full-year 2025 financial results: 昨天，美团公布 2025 全年业绩公告：

Revenue was 364.85 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 8.1%, but a full-year loss of 23.4 billion yuan was recorded, a significant turnaround from a profit of 35.8 billion yuan in the previous year.

The main reason for the loss was comprehensive investment expansion amidst intensified competition: 亏损主因在于竞争加剧下的全面投入扩张：

Sales and marketing expenses surged by 60.9% year-on-year to 102.9 billion yuan, with their proportion of revenue rising from 19% to 28.2%; the operating profit margin of the core local commerce segment plummeted from 20.9% to -2.6%, resulting in an operating loss of 6.9 billion yuan; R&D expenses increased by 23.5% year-on-year to 26 billion yuan, primarily for AI investments.

In terms of AI deployment, Meituan last year launched intelligent assistants "Xiaomei" and "Xiaotuan," leveraging its self-developed "LongCat" series of large models to deeply cultivate local life scenarios. 在 AI 布局上，美团去年推出智能助手「小美」与「小团」，依托自研「LongCat」系列大模型深耕本地生活场景。

According to Yicai Global, during the subsequent earnings call, Meituan CEO Wang Xing mentioned development plans for key businesses such as overseas expansion and AI. The report stated that Wang Xing spent a considerable amount of time discussing Meituan's views on AI. 据第一财经消息，在随后的财报电话会上，美团 CEO 王兴提及了出海、AI 等重点业务的发展规划。报道称，王兴花了较大篇幅讲述美团对于 AI 的看法。

He stated that the only reasonable strategy in the AI revolution is offense, not defense. However, Meituan will not blindly pursue becoming a "token factory," but rather view AI as a strategic opportunity to improve, strengthen, and even fundamentally transform its core business of local services. 他表示，在 AI 革命中唯一合理的策略是进攻，而不是防守。但美团不会盲目追求成为「词元工厂」，而是将 AI 视为战略机遇，用于改进、加强甚至彻底变革本地服务这一核心业务。

Wang Xing stated that since the beginning of 2023, Meituan has made large-scale investments in capital expenditure and AI talent. "Excluding companies with cloud computing businesses, Meituan's investment scale in AI is likely the largest among domestic enterprises, and it has been consistently deploying for over three years." 王兴表示，自 2023 年初以来，美团在资本支出和 AI 人才上进行了大规模投入，「除有云计算业务的企业外，美团在 AI 上的投入规模，大概率是国内企业里最大的，且已经坚持布局三年多了。」

Wang Xing believes that the key to an AI "super portal" lies in accurately understanding user needs and efficiently executing tasks, with a complexity far exceeding "chatbots." Especially in the local life sector, consumption scenarios are complex and diverse, massive merchant information is scattered, and data and information have not been effectively digitized. At the same time, local life platforms also need in-depth management of fulfillment and delivery, which is a capability lacking in general AI. 王兴认为，AI「超级入口」，关键在于精准理解用户需求，并且高效执行任务，其复杂程度远超「聊天机器人」。尤其是本地生活领域，消费场景复杂多样、海量商家信息分散，数据和信息未被有效线上化。同时，本地生活平台还需要对履约交付做深入的管理，这是通用 AI 所欠缺的能力。

Wang Xing stated that future model capabilities will continue to be optimized, and Meituan will continue to deepen the integration of "Xiaotuan" within the Meituan APP, striving to make Meituan the AI portal for future local life needs. 王兴表示，未来模型能力会持续优化，美团也会继续深化「小团」在美团 APP 里的融合，力争让美团成为未来本地生活需求的 AI 入口。

Additionally, the conference call also revealed news that food delivery losses are expected to improve in the first quarter. Wang Xing stated that the quarter-on-quarter improvement in average loss per order for catering and food delivery in the first quarter of this year is expected to be better than that of the fourth quarter last year. 另外，电话会还透露了一季度外卖亏损将好转的消息。 王兴表示，预计今年一季度餐饮外卖的单均亏损环比优化幅度会好于去年四季度。

item.title: 刘强东造游艇最新进展：制造基地落户大连
item.guid: 刘强东造游艇最新进展：制造基地落户大连
item.description:
According to Liaoning Release, on March 25, Dalian Municipal Government and Shenzhen Tan Hai Yacht Industry Development Co., Ltd. signed a strategic cooperation agreement, officially establishing the Tan Hai Yacht Manufacturing Base and Yacht Operations Project in Dalian, with a total investment of 15 billion yuan. 据辽宁发布消息，3 月 25 日，大连市政府与深圳市探海游艇产业发展有限公司签署战略合作协议，总投资 150 亿元的探海游艇制造基地与游艇运营项目正式落户大连。

The report mentioned that Xu Kunlin, Secretary of the Provincial Party Committee, Wang Xinwei, Governor, and Liu Qiangdong, investor of Tan Hai Yacht Industry Development Co., Ltd., attended the signing ceremony. 报道提到，省委书记许昆林、省长王新伟、探海游艇产业发展有限公司投资人刘强东出席签约仪式。

It is reported that Tan Hai Company will invest 15 billion yuan to build a customized high-end yacht production line in Dalian, mainly engaged in the R&D, design, and manufacturing of large yachts and accessories, operating a yacht city parlor and integrated service mother port, and creating a yacht service hub. 据悉，探海公司将投资 150 亿元，在大连建设定制化高端游艇生产线，主要从事大型游艇及配件研发、设计和生产制造，运营游艇城市会客厅及综合服务母港，打造游艇服务枢纽。

In February this year, Zhuhai Municipal Government signed the "Strategic Cooperation Framework Agreement for the High-end Yacht Industrial Base Project" with Tan Hai Yacht, with a planned total investment of approximately 5 billion yuan. 今年 2 月，珠海市政府与探海游艇签署《高端游艇产业基地项目战略合作框架协议》，项目计划总投资额约 50 亿元。

According to "21st Century Business Herald," Liu Qiangdong stated at the scene that his energy would still primarily be focused on JD.com Group. However, he also responded to the total investment of 5 billion yuan, saying, "Only in this way can we compete with top global yacht manufacturing companies in Europe and America." 据「21 世纪经济」消息，刘强东在现场指出，自己的精力仍将主要放在京东集团。但同时他也针对 50 亿的总投资额做出回应，「这样才能够去跟欧美全球顶级的游艇制造公司竞争。」

He revealed that he will be dedicated to creating 100% new energy yachts and hopes to lead the industry in the future to produce yachts at the 100,000 yuan level, "allowing yachts to enter thousands of households just like cars." 他透露，将致力于打造百分之百的新能源游艇，并希望未来能带动行业造出 10 万元级别的游艇，「让游艇像汽车一样进入千家万户。」

item.title: 斯柯达将退出中国市场
item.guid: 斯柯达将退出中国市场
item.description:
Skoda Superb

According to Beike Finance, in response to rumors of the Skoda brand exiting the Chinese market, Volkswagen China responded: 据贝壳财经消息，针对斯柯达品牌退出中国市场传闻，大众中国方面回应称：

Skoda car sales in China will continue until mid-2026, after which comprehensive warranty and after-sales service support will still be provided to car owners. 斯柯达汽车在中国的销售将持续到 2026 年年中，此后仍将为车主持续提供得全面的保修和售后服务支持。

Volkswagen China stated that Skoda Auto has adjusted its global strategy, focusing on high-growth markets such as India and ASEAN. 大众中国方面表示，斯柯达汽车对全球战略进行了调整，将重点聚焦印度、东盟等高增长市场。

At the same time, Volkswagen China reiterated that China remains at the core of Volkswagen Group's global strategy. 同时，大众中国再次强调，中国始终是大众汽车集团全球战略的核心。

It is reported that Volkswagen Group has nearly 40 factories in China, serving over 50 million customers, and has also established the largest R&D center outside its German headquarters—Volkswagen (China) Technology Co., Ltd. (VCTC)—to continuously advance the development of intelligent connected vehicle technology. 据悉，大众集团在华建有近 40 座工厂，服务超 5000 万名客户，同时设立了德国总部外规模最大的研发中心——大众汽车（中国）科技有限公司（VCTC），以持续推进智能网联汽车技术的开发。

item.title: Meta 将推出扶持中小型企业推动 AI 应用落地
item.guid: Meta-将推出扶持中小型企业推动-AI-应用落地
item.description:
According to Axios, Meta announced on Wednesday local time the launch of the 'Meta for Small Business' program, aimed at supporting startups and promoting the implementation of AI technology. 据 Axios 报道，当地时间周三，Meta 宣布启动「Meta 中小企业」计划，旨在扶持创业企业并推动 AI 技术的落地应用。

Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg stated in an internal memo to employees that over 250 million small and medium-sized businesses worldwide currently use Meta's products through Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp, and tens of millions of entrepreneurs connect with customers and achieve business growth daily through its platforms. Meta CEO 马克·扎克伯格在致员工的内部备忘录中表示，目前全球已有逾 2.5 亿家中小企业通过 Facebook、Instagram 和 WhatsApp 使用 Meta 旗下产品，数千万创业者每天借助其平台与客户建立连接、实现业务增长。

In the age of AI, it should be easier than ever for people to start new businesses. We hope to build relevant services to achieve this goal. This is crucial for ensuring that the public can widely share in the prosperity created by superintelligence. 在 AI 时代，人们创办新企业的难度理应比以往任何时候都更低。我们希望打造相关服务来实现这一目标。这对于确保大众能够广泛共享超级智能所创造的繁荣至关重要。

The program will be jointly led by Meta President and Vice Chairman Dina Powell McCormick and Head of Product Naomi Gleit, both of whom are the company's highest-level executives. 该计划将由 Meta 总裁兼副董事长迪娜·鲍威尔·麦考密克（Dina Powell McCormick）和产品负责人内奥米·格莱特（Naomi Gleit）共同牵头，二人均为公司最高级别高管。

item.title: 荣耀高管谈内存涨价：价格高位或持续到 28 年
item.guid: 荣耀高管谈内存涨价：价格高位或持续到-28-年
item.description:
Yesterday, Lin Lin, Vice President of Honor China, published a lengthy article sharing his judgment on the comprehensive price increase trend in the consumer electronics industry. His prediction is: 昨天，荣耀中国区副总裁林林发长文，分享了其对消费电子行业全面涨价趋势的判断。其预判：

High storage prices will continue until the second half of next year or even 2028, with the only variable being whether the contraction in consumer demand exceeds expectations.

He also described a low-probability scenario in the article: if actual demand shrinks to 70%-75%, while manufacturers have stocked up based on an 85% estimate, there might be a brief, slight pullback, but with limited room, as the demand for storage from AI servers remains a 'bottomless pit' and can quickly absorb the capacity released by the consumer side. 其还在文中描述了一种小概率情形：若实际需求收缩至 70%-75%，而各厂商已按 85% 预估备货，届时或出现短暂微幅回调，但空间有限，因为 AI 服务器端对存储的需求仍是「无底洞」，可以迅速吸收消费端释放的产能。

Lin Lin pointed out that almost all core materials in the current industry are in a price increase channel, including RAM, storage, VRAM, and processors (CPU/SoC). Among them, storage has seen the most significant increase. Gaming laptops face the heaviest price pressure due to the simultaneous stacking of three costs: RAM, storage, and VRAM, followed by thin and light laptops, and then mobile phones and tablets. 林林指出，当前行业几乎所有核心物料均处于涨价通道，包括内存、存储、显存及处理器 CPU/SoC。其中存储涨幅最为显著，游戏本因同时叠加内存、存储与显存三项成本，涨价压力最重，其次为轻薄本，再次为手机和平板。

Regarding the phenomenon of chaotic market prices, Lin Lin explained that the fundamental reason lies in the varying depths of low-cost inventory among manufacturers: manufacturers with ample stock or previously weak sales still have a large quantity of low-priced inventory to digest; while low-end products, due to their fast turnover, were the first to deplete low-priced inventory, leading to abnormal pricing where low-end products are more expensive than high-end ones. 对于市场价格混乱的现象，林林解释称，根本原因在于各厂商低成本库存深度不同：备货充足或此前销量偏弱的厂商，仍有大量低价存货可消化；而低端产品因流速快率先耗尽低价库存，已出现低端倒挂高端的异常定价。

He judged that April and June will be two critical nodes in this round of price increases, by which time low-cost inventory will be rapidly depleted. When asked by a netizen whether price pressure would ease during the 618 shopping festival, Lin Lin directly responded: 'Impossible.' 他判断，4 月和 6 月将是本轮涨价的两个关键节点，届时低成本库存将加速耗尽。有网友询问 618 大促期间涨价压力是否会有所缓和，林林直接回应：「不可能。」

item.title: 💡 苹果联创：我不太喜欢 AI
item.guid: 💡-苹果联创：我不太喜欢-AI
item.description:
According to Fox Business, Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak stated in an interview on Sunday with Fox Business anchor Liz Claman's show 'The Claman Countdown' that existing AI systems still have significant shortcomings in reliability and emotional understanding. 据 Fox Business 报道，苹果联合创始人史蒂夫·沃兹尼亚克（Steve Wozniak）于本周日接受 Fox Business 主播 Liz Claman 的节目《The Claman Countdown》采访时表示，现有 AI 系统在可靠性与情感理解方面仍存在明显不足。

Wozniak emphasized in the interview that he expects technology to truly understand human emotions, rather than just outputting well-worded answers. 沃兹尼亚克在采访中强调，他期望技术能够真正理解人类情感，而非仅仅输出措辞得当的回答。

I hope there's someone like me thinking, knowing how I feel, understanding these emotional things.

He also pointed out, based on his own user experience, that AI systems often fail to answer questions directly, providing broad content that even deviates from the requirements. 他还结合自身的使用体验指出，AI 系统往往无法直接回答问题，给出的内容宽泛甚至偏离需求。

I want reliable content every time... I really don't like AI.

He also expressed concerns about AI-induced dependency. He believes that people's increasing reliance on automated systems may change the way humans process information and solve problems. 他还对 AI 引发的依赖行为表达了担忧。他认为，人们对自动化系统的日益依赖，可能会改变人类处理信息和解决问题的方式。

item.title: 大疆首款全景无人机发布，2788 元起
item.guid: 大疆首款全景无人机发布，2788-元起
item.description:
Last night, DJI officially released its first 8K panoramic flagship drone, the DJI Avata 360. Let's look at the prices: 昨晚，大疆正式发布首款 8K 全景旗舰无人机大疆 DJI Avata 360，先看售价：

Aircraft only: 2788 yuan; with DJI RC 2: 4388 yuan; Fly More Combo (including DJI RC2): 5488 yuan; Motion Combo: 5488 yuan.

As DJI's first panoramic drone, the DJI Avata 360 features a 1-inch flagship imaging system, supports 8K/60fps HDR high-definition video recording, and is equipped with a flagship O4+ full HD video transmission, built-in 4G enhanced video transmission, and an omnidirectional obstacle avoidance system. 作为大疆首款全景无人机，DJI Avata 360 拥有一英寸旗舰影像，支持 8K/60fps HDR 高清视频拍摄，同时还搭载了旗舰级 O4+ 全高清图传、内置 4G 增强图传以及全向避障系统。

When shooting, the DJI Avata 360 can easily switch to single-lens mode via the remote controller, transforming into the classic Avata series form, providing content creators with a 4K/60fps high-quality video recording experience. DJI Avata 360 在进行拍摄时可通过遥控器轻松切换至单镜头模式，化身 Avata 系列经典形态，为内容创作者带来 4K/60fps 的高画质视频录制体验。

In terms of detailed experience, the DJI Avata 360's outer lens features a convenient detachable design, allowing users to replace it themselves by simply purchasing the lens and specialized tools; the body also has 42GB of built-in storage, capable of storing approximately 30 minutes of 8K panoramic video footage. 细节体验方面，DJI Avata 360 镜头外层镜片采用便捷的可拆换设计，用户仅需购买镜片与专用工具，即可自行更换；同时机身内置 42GB 存储空间，可存储约 30 分钟 8K 全景视频素材。

item.title: 零跑 A10 上市，售价 6.58 万元起
item.guid: 零跑-A10-上市，售价-6.58-万元起
item.description:
Last night, Leapmotor officially released its new A10 model. Let's look at the prices: 昨晚，零跑汽车正式发布了全新 A10 车型，先看售价：

65,800-86,800 yuan, with two range versions: 403km and 505km. The top-end model is equipped with lidar.

The new car is positioned as an A0-class pure electric SUV, with dimensions of 4270/1810/1635mm (L/W/H) and a wheelbase of 2605mm; the front face features a closed grille, the doors use semi-hidden door handles, and the overall lines are rounded with a relatively simple surface treatment. 新车定位 A0 级纯电 SUV，尺寸为 4270/1810/1635mm（长宽高），轴距 2605 mm；前脸采用封闭式格栅，车门使用半隐藏式门把手，整体线条偏圆润，型面处理相对简洁。

In terms of interior, the A10 comes standard with an 8.88-inch LCD instrument cluster and a 14.6-inch floating central control screen across all models; the lidar version also features an upgraded Qualcomm SA8295 chip and is equipped with a 16 GB + 128 GB storage combination. 内饰方面，A10 全系标配 8.88 英寸液晶仪表和 14.6 英寸悬浮式中控屏；激光雷达版还越级搭载了高通 SA8295 芯片，并配备 16 GB + 128 GB 存储组合。

For the powertrain, the new car is equipped with a 39.5/53 kWh battery pack, matched with a seven-in-one high-performance oil-cooled electric drive, with a top speed of 160 km/h; fast charging introduces an 800V high-voltage architecture, requiring 16 minutes to charge from 30-80%. 三电方面，新车搭载 39.5/53 kWh 电池包，匹配七合一高性能油冷电驱，最高时速可达 160 km/h；快充引入 800V 高压架构，30-80% 充电需 16 分钟。

Additionally, the top-end model is equipped with 27 high-precision sensing hardware, including lidar, and a Qualcomm 8650 assisted driving chip, supporting "parking space to parking space" full-scenario navigation assisted driving capabilities. 另外，顶配配备包括激光雷达在内的 27 个高精度感知硬件，以及高通 8650 辅助驾驶芯片，支持「车位到车位」全场景领航辅助驾驶能力。

🔗 Related reading: Unfair! Leapmotor A10 Gathers 800V, Lidar, and "Parking Space to Parking Space" for Just 65,800 Yuan 🔗 相关阅读： 不讲武德！零跑 A10 集齐 800V、激光雷达和「车位到车位」，只要 6.58 万元起

item.title: 1999 元起，iQOO Z11 系列正式发布
item.guid: 1999-元起，iQOO-Z11-系列正式发布
item.description:
Yesterday, iQOO officially released two new phones: the Z11 and Z11x: 昨天，iQOO 正式发布 Z11 和 Z11x 两款新机：

iQOO Z11: iQOO Z11：

    MediaTek Dimensity 8500 full-power version; rear 50MP main camera + 2MP, front 16MP;

    9020 mAh Blue Ocean battery, supports 90W flash charging, 55W PD/PPS; 6.83-inch AMOLED, 1.5K resolution, 165 Hz refresh rate;

    8GB + 256GB starting price 1999 yuan, 16GB + 512GB top-end 3199 yuan.

iQOO Z11x: iQOO Z11x：

    MediaTek Dimensity 7400; rear 50MP main camera, front 8MP;

    7200 mAh battery, supports 44W fast charging, 44W PD; 6.76-inch LCD, 120 Hz refresh rate, global brightness up to 1200nits;

    The starting price is 1499 yuan for 8GB + 256GB, and 2199 yuan for 12GB + 512GB.

item.title: OPPO Enco Clip2 耳夹耳机亮相
item.guid: OPPO-Enco-Clip2-耳夹耳机亮相
item.description:
Yesterday, OPPO officially unveiled the Watch X3 mini and the new ear-clip headphones Enco Clip2. 昨天，OPPO 正式公布了 Watch X3 mini 以及全新耳夹式耳机 Enco Clip2。

The OPPO Watch X3 mini also features a platinum color scheme, retaining the rotating crown on the top right and the shortcut button on the bottom right; the custom gift box version also offers a genuine leather strap and a custom cat charging stand. OPPO Watch X3 mini 同样采用了白金配色，保留了右上角的旋转表冠以及右下角的快捷按键；定制礼盒版本还提供真皮表带以及定制猫咪充电支架。

The Enco Clip2 features a brand-new glossy design: the body is entirely treated with a glossy gold finish; according to the released images, the Enco Clip2 will also feature Dynaudio co-tuning. Enco Clip2 则采用了全新的亮面设计：机身均采用亮面金色处理；据公布的图片显示，Enco Clip2 还将拥有丹拿联合调音。

Additionally, OPPO will officially release the new K15 Pro on April 1st: it will feature a metal frame, a "Lanying" breathing light, and a built-in cooling fan. 另外，OPPO 还将在 4 月 1 日正式发布全新的 K15 Pro 新机：配备金属中框，拥有岚影呼吸灯、内置扇热风扇。

item.title: 马斯克：特斯拉正开发一台神秘新车
item.guid: 马斯克：特斯拉正开发一台神秘新车
item.description:
On March 25, Elon Musk posted to confirm that Tesla is developing a new model, focusing on filling the market gap in its large family travel product line. 3 月 25 日，马斯克发文确认，特斯拉正在开发一款全新车型，重点填补旗下大家庭出行产品线的市场空白。

Musk posted that day, stating that the Cybertruck's rear seats have three ISOFIX connectors, wide enough to install three child safety seats or accommodate three adults. 马斯克当天发文称，赛博皮卡（Cybertruck）的后排有三个 isofix 接口，宽度足够安装三个儿童安全座椅或者是容纳三个成年人。

Later, a netizen asked, "Musk, can you make a minivan (a type of MPV)?", to which Musk enthusiastically replied, "A cooler vehicle than a minivan is coming soon." 随后有网友称，「马斯克你能不能造个 minivan（MPV 的一种）」，马斯克则热情回复「一款比 minivan 还酷的车型即将到来」。

In October 2024, Tesla showcased an electric minibus called Robovan at the "We, Robot" launch event, featuring 14 seats and fully autonomous driving powered by FSD. 在 2024 年 10 月，特斯拉曾在「We,Robot」这场发布会上展示过一款电动小巴 Robovan，全车 14 个座位，由 FSD 进行全自动驾驶。

item.title: 五菱官宣缤果 Pro
item.guid: 五菱官宣缤果-Pro
item.description:
Yesterday, Wuling officially unveiled its new generation Bingo model, the "Bingo Pro". 昨日，五菱正式公布了旗下新一代缤果车型「缤果 Pro」。

The new car retains the rounded shape of the Bingo series, while the front headlight cluster has been redesigned to be circular; the body offers multiple two-tone color options; the taillights feature a rounded, rectangular-like design; and the car is equipped with multiple chrome trim strips around its body. 新车保持缤果系列的圆润造型，同时前大灯组改为圆形设计；车身提供多款双拼配色；尾灯则采用圆润的类矩形设计；车身四周配备多个镀铬装饰条。

According to previous reports, the new car measures 4050mm (length) × 1758mm (width) × 1580mm (height), with a wheelbase of 2560mm; it offers accessories such as front and rear radar and exterior mirror cameras; in terms of power, it provides a 65kW motor. 据此前消息，新车尺寸为 4050mm（长）×1758mm（宽）×1580mm（高），轴距为 2560mm；提供前后雷达、外后视镜摄像头等配件；动力方面提供 65kW 电机。

item.title: 罗技鼠标推广视频惹众怒，客服致歉
item.guid: 罗技鼠标推广视频惹众怒，客服致歉
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, on March 26, Logitech's official account on a short video platform posted a mouse promotion video with the caption "As soon as I lower the price, aren't they all running over like dogs?", which sparked strong condemnation from netizens. 据界面新闻消息，3 月 26 日，罗技在短视频平台的官方账号发布鼠标推广视频，配文「我一降价，还不是像狗一样跑过来」，引发网友强烈声讨。

The relevant video has since been removed, but on the evening of the 26th, many netizens still left comments expressing their dissatisfaction in the account's live stream and member groups. 目前相关视频已下架，而在 26 日晚该账号的直播间和会员群中，仍有众多网友留言表达不满。

Logitech's flagship store customer service stated through reports that they will strictly strengthen content review, accept all criticism, and have already issued a severe warning to colleagues in the short video team, deducting all performance bonuses as punishment. 罗技旗舰店客服通过报道表示，后续将严格加强内容审核，接受所有批评，目前已经给予短视频组同事严厉警告，扣除全部绩效处罚。

item.title: 世界最大跨径双层悬索桥狮子洋大桥主塔封顶
item.guid: 世界最大跨径双层悬索桥狮子洋大桥主塔封顶
item.description:
According to CCTV News, at around 11:00 on March 26, the main east and west towers of the Lingyangyang Bridge, a critical control project of the Lingyangyang Channel, a core hub project in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, were topped out, marking the transition to upper structure construction. 据央视新闻报道，3 月 26 日 11 时许，粤港澳大湾区核心枢纽工程狮子洋通道关键控制性工程——狮子洋大桥实现东、西主塔封顶，转入上部结构施工。

It is understood that the Lingyangyang Channel has a total length of 35 kilometers. Its main project consists of the Lingyangyang Bridge, a cross-river main bridge, and land approach engineering. It spans the strategic bottleneck at the "A"-shaped apex of the Pearl River Estuary, connecting Guangzhou's Nansha District with Dongguan's Shatin and Humen towns, representing another crucial step in the development of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area. 据了解，狮子洋通道全长 35 公里，主体工程由跨江主桥狮子洋大桥及陆域引线工程组成，横跨珠江口「A」字形顶端的咽喉要道，连接广州南沙区和东莞沙田、虎门两镇，是粤港澳大湾区发展的又一重要落子。

In the future, it will work with the surrounding road network to build a "1-hour living circle," contributing to the high-quality construction and development of the Pearl River Delta urban cluster. 未来将与周边路网共同构建「1 小时生活圈」，助力珠三角城市群高质量建设发展。

Based on a comprehensive consideration of factors such as the high economic development of surrounding cities, dense waterways, and scarce resources for cross-river channel alignments, the Lingyangyang Channel opted to construct a suspension bridge with a main span of 2180 meters, achieving "one span across the river," and adopted a double-deck, 16-lane design. This will set 5 world records for double-deck suspension bridges: "main span length, number of lanes, main tower height, anchor foundation diameter, and main cable diameter." 基于周边城市经济发达程度高、航道密集和过江通道线位资源稀缺等因素的综合考虑，狮子洋通道选择建设主跨 2180 米的悬索桥「一跨过江」，并采用上下双层 16 车道的设计方案，将创下双层悬索桥「主跨跨径、车道数量、主塔高度、锚碇直径和主缆直径」5 项世界第一。

item.title: 美团：用 AI 造谣骑手，一网民遭拘留
item.guid: 美团：用-AI-造谣骑手，一网民遭拘留
item.description:
Meituan officially announced yesterday that Shanghai Qingpu Public Security Bureau has solved a case of spreading rumors in the food delivery industry using AI-generated content. 美团官方昨天发文称，上海青浦公安分局已破获一起利用 AI 素材散布外卖行业谣言的案件。

The cybersecurity department discovered during routine patrols that netizen Liu, in order to gain traffic, downloaded a video labeled "AI-generated" from the internet, deliberately removed the AI generation label, and then published it on a short video platform under the pretext of "a delivery driver from a certain platform repackaging noodles spilled on the ground for delivery," fabricating a scenario of a rider violating delivery regulations. 网安部门在日常巡查中发现，网民刘某某为博取流量，从网络下载一段标注「AI 技术生成」的视频，刻意抹去 AI 生成标识后，将其以「某平台外卖员将洒落在地的面条重新装盒配送」为由发布至短视频平台，虚构骑手违规配送情节。

After the video spread, netizens Gao and Wu, to gain attention, posted false bandwagon comments in the comment section such as "I've done it too" and "Who hasn't done this," further amplifying the rumor's impact. 视频扩散后，网民高某某、武某某为蹭热度，在评论区发布「我也干过」「这事谁没干过」等不实跟风言论，进一步放大谣言影响。

Currently, Liu has been administratively detained according to law, and Gao and Wu have been administratively penalized according to law. Meituan stated that the company has always firmly upheld the image and rights of its delivery riders and will collaborate with relevant departments to severely crack down on such content. 目前，刘某某已被依法处以行政拘留，高某某、武某某被依法处以行政处罚。美团方面表示，公司始终坚决维护骑手群体形象与权益，并将协同有关部门对此类内容予以严厉打击。

item.title: 《洛克王国：世界》正式上线
item.guid: 《洛克王国：世界》正式上线
item.description:
《Locke's Kingdom: World》 officially launched on all platforms yesterday, with downloads rapidly soaring after its opening, reaching the top spot on Apple's App Store China's free games chart. 《洛克王国：世界》昨日全平台正式上线，开服后下载量迅速飙升，已登顶苹果 App Store 中国区免费游戏榜首位。

《Locke's Kingdom: World》 is the official sequel to the classic web game 《Locke's Kingdom》, developed by the original Tencent MoFang Studio team based on the Unreal Engine 4, supporting PC, Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS across multiple platforms, with data interoperability across all platforms. 《洛克王国：世界》是经典页游《洛克王国》的正统续作，由腾讯魔方工作室原班人马基于虚幻 4 引擎打造，支持 PC、安卓、iOS、鸿蒙多端，全平台数据互通。

The game currently features 347 spirits, offers over 50 hours of story content, and players will take on the role of a magic academy freshman, embarking on adventures in an open continent inhabited by spirits. The core gameplay revolves around spirit collection, training, and battles, and supports multiplayer interaction. 游戏目前收录 347 只精灵，提供超 50 小时剧情内容，玩家将扮演魔法学院新生，在精灵栖息的开放大陆展开冒险，核心玩法围绕精灵收集、养成与对战展开，并支持多人同玩互动。

item.title: 《疯狂动物城 2》密钥到期，上映四个月票房 45.94 亿元
item.guid: 《疯狂动物城-2》密钥到期，上映四个月票房-45.94-亿元
item.description:
Disney animated film 《Zootopia 2》's key expired yesterday, with its final box office in mainland China settling at 4.594 billion yuan, ranking 7th on China's all-time box office chart. 迪士尼动画电影《疯狂动物城 2》密钥已于昨天到期，中国内地最终票房定格在 45.94 亿元，位列中国影史票房榜第 7 位。

Currently, the top ten films on China's all-time box office chart are: 《Nezha Conquers the Dragon King》 15.446 billion, 《The Battle at Lake Changjin》 5.775 billion, 《Wolf Warrior 2》 5.694 billion, 《Hi, Mom》 5.413 billion, 《Nezha》 5.035 billion, 《The Wandering Earth》 4.688 billion, 《Zootopia 2》 4.594 billion, 《Full River Red》 4.544 billion, 《Detective Chinatown 3》 4.523 billion, 《Pegasus 3》 4.320 billion. 目前中国影史票房榜前十依次为：《哪吒之魔童闹海》154.46 亿、《长津湖》57.75 亿、《战狼 2》56.94 亿、《你好，李焕英》54.13 亿、《哪吒之魔童降世》50.35 亿、《流浪地球》46.88 亿、《疯狂动物城 2》45.94 亿、《满江红》45.44 亿、《唐人街探案 3》45.23 亿、《飞驰人生 3》43.20 亿。

item.title: 《拆弹专家 3》宣布启动
item.guid: 《拆弹专家-3》宣布启动
item.description:
According to Sina Movies, the first concept poster for 《Shock Wave 3》, the new installment in the 'Shock Wave' series directed by Herman Yau and produced by Andy Lau, has been released, announcing its launch. 据新浪电影消息，由邱礼涛执导、刘德华监制的「拆弹专家」系列新作《拆弹专家 3》发布首款概念海报，宣布启动。

The previous film 《Shock Wave 2》, directed by Herman Yau and starring Andy Lau, Sean Lau, and Ni Ni, was released in 2020 and will be re-released in mainland China on March 28 this year. 前作 《拆弹专家 2》由邱礼涛执导，刘德华、刘青云、倪妮主演，于 2020 年上映，今年 3 月 28 日将在中国内地重映。

item.title: 猪猪侠新电影定档五一
item.guid: 猪猪侠新电影定档五一
item.description:
Recently, the movie 《GG Bond: Racing Heroes》 announced its release date for May 1st. 近日，电影《猪猪侠大电影之竞速小英雄》宣布定档 5 月 1 日上映。

It is reported that the new movie marks the first time GG Bond and Star Sail appear on screen together as a tacit duo. They will travel through time to the past and use racing to save the Racing God Galaxy, who has been affected by a mysterious substance. The film is also the first theatrical movie in the 《Racing Heroes》 series. 据悉，新电影是猪猪侠与星航默契搭档首次银幕同框，两人将穿越时空回到过去，用赛车拯救被神秘物质影响的车神银河。影片也是《竞速小英雄》系列的首部院线大电影。

The film is directed by Gu Yanmei, with Wang Yongjian and Zhong Yu serving as directors. 该片由古燕梅担任总导演，王永健、钟彧担任导演。

早报
